scripts.verify:apps: pnpm check:boundaries && pnpm check:protocol && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build
scripts.verify:core: pnpm core:fmt && pnpm core:test && pnpm core:test:sqlite && pnpm core:test:memory:sqlite && pnpm core:clippy && pnpm core:clippy:sqlite && pnpm core:clippy:memory:sqlite
scripts.core:test:sqlite: cd core && cargo test -p codel00p-storage --features sqlite
scripts.core:test:memory:sqlite: cd core && cargo test -p codel00p-memory --features sqlite
scripts.core:coverage:storage: cd core && cargo llvm-cov -p codel00p-storage --features sqlite --summary-only
scripts.core:clippy:sqlite: cd core && cargo clippy -p codel00p-storage --features sqlite --all-targets -- -D warnings
scripts.core:clippy:memory:sqlite: cd core && cargo clippy -p codel00p-memory --features sqlite --all-targets -- -D warnings
